notes: This JSON is an experiment seed, not production criteria.
The original seed package contained an incorrect repo-PDF availability note; that claim is not treated as authoritative here.

review.title: Preference-Based Learning in Audio Applications: A Systematic Analysis
review.design_intent: Stage 1 keeps only title, abstract, keywords, and first-page observable signals, and defers unstable or full-text-only confirmation to Stage 2.

reviewer_guardrails: Metadata such as publication year or venue may be recorded only as corpus notes and must not be used as eligibility evidence or to override semantic evidence.

questions.question: title/abstract 是否顯示 preference-learning evidence，例如 ranking、pairwise / A-B comparison、comparative feedback，或明示 preferences 用於 learning？
questions.expected_answer_form: present | absent | unclear + 一句 title/abstract 證據說明
questions.quote_requirement: 必須引用 title 或 abstract 中最短、最直接的支持或反證片段；若完全沒有足夠訊號，標 unclear。
questions.location_requirement: title / abstract / keywords / first-page abstract block
questions.missingness_reason_guidance: unclear 時說明 abstract 過短、語義含糊、或只出現鄰近任務而未明言。
questions.stage2_handoff: 若只有 ratings 而未見轉成 preference，Stage 2 釐清。

questions.question: 若沒有明確 pairwise comparison，title/abstract 是否仍顯示 numeric ratings 被轉為 rankings/preferences，或存在 RL training loop for an audio model？
questions.expected_answer_form: present | absent | unclear + 一句 title/abstract 證據說明
questions.quote_requirement: 必須引用 title 或 abstract 中最短、最直接的支持或反證片段；若完全沒有足夠訊號，標 unclear。
questions.location_requirement: title / abstract / keywords / first-page abstract block
questions.missingness_reason_guidance: unclear 時說明 abstract 過短、語義含糊、或只出現鄰近任務而未明言。

questions.question: title/abstract 是否顯示研究應用於 audio domain；multimodal works including audio 也算在內？
questions.expected_answer_form: present | absent | unclear + 一句 title/abstract 證據說明
questions.quote_requirement: 必須引用 title 或 abstract 中最短、最直接的支持或反證片段；若完全沒有足夠訊號，標 unclear。
questions.location_requirement: title / abstract / keywords / first-page abstract block
questions.missingness_reason_guidance: unclear 時說明 abstract 過短、語義含糊、或只出現鄰近任務而未明言。
questions.stage2_handoff: 若 audio 只在周邊場景出現，Stage 2 釐清。

questions.question: title/abstract 是否顯示 preferences 用於 learning / training / adaptation，而不是 solely for evaluation？
questions.expected_answer_form: present | absent | unclear + 一句 title/abstract 證據說明
questions.quote_requirement: 必須引用 title 或 abstract 中最短、最直接的支持或反證片段；若完全沒有足夠訊號，標 unclear。
questions.location_requirement: title / abstract / keywords / first-page abstract block
questions.missingness_reason_guidance: unclear 時說明 abstract 過短、語義含糊、或只出現鄰近任務而未明言。
questions.stage2_handoff: 若只見 human evaluation without training consequence，Stage 2 確認。

questions.question: title/abstract 是否清楚顯示為 survey / review article？
questions.expected_answer_form: present | absent | unclear + 一句 title/abstract 證據說明
questions.quote_requirement: 必須引用 title 或 abstract 中最短、最直接的支持或反證片段；若完全沒有足夠訊號，標 unclear。
questions.location_requirement: title / abstract / keywords / first-page abstract block
questions.missingness_reason_guidance: unclear 時說明 abstract 過短、語義含糊、或只出現鄰近任務而未明言。

handoff_policy: 若任一核心題只得到 unclear，不得因為缺少摘要訊號而自行補寫新 exclusion。
若 paper 同時出現納入訊號與鄰近非目標訊號，Stage 1 只記錄衝突與 present / absent / unclear 狀態，真正的 semantic closure 交給 Stage 2。
Metadata-only 條件不得覆蓋正文語義；正文語義也不得取代外部可驗證 metadata。
non_goals: 不直接輸出最終納入結論
不把原 SR 的 paper-specific 例子升級成 general rule
不把 performance-oriented hardening 回寫成 formal criteria
